cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists carts cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists members cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists order_items cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists product_images cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists products cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists shop_orders cascade Hibernate: create table cart_items ( quantity integer not null, cart_id bigint not null, id bigint generated by default as identity, product_id bigint not null, primary key (id), unique (cart_id, product_id) ) Hibernate: create table carts ( id bigint generated by default as identity, member_id bigint not null unique, primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table members ( created_at timestamp(6) not null, id bigint generated by default as identity, name varchar(50) not null, email varchar(120) not null unique, password varchar(255) not null, role enum ('ADMIN','USER') not null, primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table order_items ( line_total numeric(14,2) not null, quantity integer not null, unit_price numeric(12,2) not null, id bigint generated by default as identity, product_id bigint, shop_order_id bigint not null, product_name varchar(200) not null, primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table product_images ( sort_order integer not null, id bigint generated by default as identity, product_id bigint not null, directory_path varchar(500) not null, original_filename varchar(255) not null, stored_filename varchar(255) not null, thumbnail_filename varchar(255), primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table products ( price numeric(12,2) not null, stock_quantity integer not null, created_at timestamp(6) not null, id bigint generated by default as identity, updated_at timestamp(6) not null, name varchar(200) not null, description varchar(5000) not null, primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table shop_orders ( total_amount numeric(14,2) not null, id bigint generated by default as identity, member_id bigint not null, ordered_at timestamp(6) not null, payment_confirmed_at timestamp(6) not null, order_number varchar(40) not null unique, status enum ('CANCELLED','ORDERED') not null, primary key (id) ) Hibernate: alter table if exists cart_items add
